name: GoDoxy
description: GoDoxy is a lightweight, performant reverse proxy written in Go with a WebUI, automatic SSL certificate management, Docker auto-discovery, OpenID Connect support, and Proxmox integration.

notes.text: The initial build from source takes several minutes.
Docker auto-discovery is not available in this bare-metal install. Configure routes manually via YAML files in /opt/godoxy/config/.
The admin password is shown at the end of the installation log.
For HTTPS support, configure autocert in /opt/godoxy/config/config.yml and set GODOXY_API_JWT_SECURE=true in /opt/godoxy/.env.
